## What kind of PR is this?

- [ ] New experiment (DESIGN.md included, no runs yet)
- [ ] Findings (runs + FINDINGS.md for an existing design)
- [ ] Replication
- [ ] Harness fix/extension
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] Raw artifacts committed under `runs/` (for findings/replications)
- [ ] Model + harness versions stated in artifacts
- [ ] No secrets/tokens in committed logs
- [ ] Stochastic claims state their N
